def eligible_for_mental_health_support(self) -> bool:
        is_trans_or_non_binary = self.gender in ['transgender', 'non-binary']
        is_adult = self.age > 18
        is_valid_race = self.race in ['asian', 'white', 'black']
        is_employed_or_student = self.employment_status in ['employed', 'student']
        is_master_or_doctor = self.education in ['master', 'doctor']
        is_single_or_married = self.marital_status in ['single', 'married']
        is_valid_religion = self.religion in ['christianity', 'atheist', 'hinduism']
        has_treatment_experience = self.years_of_treatment >= 1
        
        return is_trans_or_non_binary and is_adult and is_valid_race and is_employed_or_student and is_master_or_doctor and is_single_or_married and is_valid_religion and has_treatment_experience
